Appearances:
Plaintiff True Hope Square Homeowners Association is present. No representative information provided.
Attorney Jak Steven Marquez appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Regina Chavez is present.
Attorney Dennis Sinclitico representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-30-2012 remains on calendar.
